scripts.start:python:dev: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if(Test-Path .\.env){$env:DEEPSEEK_URL=(Get-Content .\.env | Select-String 'DEEPSEEK_URL').ToString().Split('=')[1]; $env:DEEPSEEK_API_KEY=(Get-Content .\.env | Select-String 'DEEPSEEK_API_KEY').ToString().Split('=')[1];}; python -m uvicorn python.scheduler_api:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765 --reload"
scripts.py:build: powershell -NoProfile -Command "cd python; py -3 -m pip install --user pyinstaller; py -3 -m PyInstaller --onefile --hidden-import sniffio --add-data 'prompts.py;.' scheduler_api.py; mkdir -Force ..\build\resources\server; Copy-Item -Path dist\scheduler_api.exe -Destination ..\build\resources\server\ -Force"
scripts.py:clean: powershell -NoProfile -Command "cd python; rm -Recurse -Force dist build __pycache__ *.spec -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
scripts.build:electron: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run py:build && npm run copy:renderer && npx electron-builder --win --x64
